intro:
I couldn't find any information about the plant "Dentillaria corymbosa". However, I did find a plant called "Dentaria corymbosa", also known as Corymb Flowered Toothwort or "Dentaria". 

Dentaria corymbosa is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. 

It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, offering health benefits such as wound healing and fever reduction. 

The bioactive constituents of Dentaria corymbosa include glucosinolates, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. 

The most common herbal preparations made with Dentaria corymbosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and skin problems.
